rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value exemptions. Educ. Code §44.043 governs school district procurement right-to-work rules. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects with no overlap.
quote: Sec. 44.043. RIGHT TO WORK. (a) This section applies to a school district while the school district is engaged in: (1) procuring goods or services; (2) awarding a contract; or (3) overseeing procurement or construction for a public work or public improvement.
_note: No conflict: proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §44.043 school district procurement right-to-work provisions.
